title: Geriatric Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Geriatric Counseling 4 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intake line for services such as case management, individual, family, group, geriatric and LGBTQ counseling, alcohol and drug treatment services, DUII and gambling addiction/treatment services, recovery housing services, sexual abuse counseling, domestic violence services, urgent mental health services, medication management, money management, outreach, crisis intervention, outpatient mental health services, and early intervention services. Provides about 1000 units in sites operating as licensed residential, permanent supported housing, and independent housing. 4212 SE Division Street Suites 100 and 200 Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 674-7777 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health consultations, evaluations, treatment, and case management for seniors in care facilities and referred from private medical practitioners. Enhanced care outreach services include intensive case management, counseling, and behavioral interventions. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Adults 65 and older and people under age 65 who are homebound due to a physical disability or persistent mental illness. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Some services available evenings and weekends by arrangement. Email (541) 322-7500 9 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mental health care to individuals and families. Services include psychotherapy for adults across the lifespan, specialized geriatric psychotherapy, counseling for children, teens, and families, short-term, solution-focused therapy, and group-based processing and support. 1221 SW Yamhill Street Suite 301 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2pm Email (503) 226-7079 650 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, substance use disorder, and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. 2210 Eldorado Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE DESCHUTES COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SENIORS MENTAL HEALTH JEWISH FAMILY AND CHILD SERVICE COUNSELING KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
